title: TIE Experimental M1

The '''TIE Experimental M1''', also known as the '''TIE Bizarro''', was an experimental member of the [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] and a part of the [[TIE Experimental Project]].

One of the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] built by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] research project led by Director [[Lenzer]] under the command of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]], the M1 consisted of a single standard [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] wing panel with two wing braces connected to a pair of standard TIE series cockpit pods. The port pod held the control systems, and the starboard pod held a [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] much heavier than the [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] equipped on any previous TIE.

Both pods had the trademark [[Twin ion engine/Legends|twin ion engines]] of the TIE series, and the fighter was actually slightly faster than the standard TIE/LN. The fighter was equipped with a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], which was [[Slave circuit|slaved]] to remote systems in a controller ship.

[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces first encountered the M1 when they responded to a distress signal from a civilian convoy near the [[Belat system/Legends|Belat system]]. A pair of [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]] escorting a staff transfer from [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']] to [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] picked up the distress call during a course change between [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jumps and responded to the attack. They found a squadron of TIE Experimental M1 fighters attacking a [[Cloburi Freight]] convoy, while a [[Beta-class ETR-3 escort transport|''Beta''-class ETR-3 escort transport]] stood by. The A-wings defeated the TIE M1s with minimal Rebel or civilian losses.

Later, when the Alliance ordered an intelligence-gathering strike on a TIE Experimental production facility, several waves of M1 fighters were found in the station's defense screen. They were also present at the main research facility, defending the hangar ship ''[[Sardis]]'' and [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Obsidian (XQ1 Platform)|''Obsidian'']].

After the destruction of space platform ''Obsidian'', no TIE Experimental fighters were seen again.
